# CanFly.ai - AI Agent Marketplace

> AI-native platform for discovering, deploying, and managing AI agent tools.
> Dual-audience design: serves both humans and AI agents.

## Navigation

/ - Homepage with featured products and getting started guides
/apps - Product catalog with categories (Free Tools, AI Skills, Cloud Hosting, Hardware)
/apps/:slug - Detailed product pages with installation guides and affiliate links
/learn/:slug - Step-by-step tutorials with automation scripts

## Categories

### Free Tools
- Ollama (/apps/ollama) - Local AI models without API keys

### Cloud Hosting
- Zeabur (/apps/zeabur) - One-click deployment (referral: OpenClaw, 10% off)

### AI Skills
- ElevenLabs (/apps/elevenlabs) - Voice synthesis (22% recurring commission)
- HeyGen (/apps/heygen) - AI video generation (20% recurring commission)

### Hardware
- Umbrel (/apps/umbrel) - Self-hosted home AI server

### Coming Soon
- Pinata (/apps/pinata) - IPFS & Web3 storage
- SwitchBot AI Hub (/apps/switchbot-ai-hub) - Smart home meets AI

## Tutorials

- /learn/ollama - Free local AI setup (5 minutes, $0)
- /learn/zeabur - Cloud deployment with Zeabur
- /learn/elevenlabs-integration - Voice synthesis setup
- /learn/heygen-video - AI video generation

## Blog

/blog - Blog listing page with category filters
/blog/:slug - Individual blog post pages with JSON-LD BlogPosting schema

### Posts
- /blog/local-ai-privacy-2026 - Why Local AI Is the Privacy Breakthrough of 2026
- /blog/deploy-ai-agent-cloud - From Laptop to Cloud: Deploy Your AI Agent in One Click
- /blog/ai-voice-video-content-creation - AI Voice and Video: The Next Frontier of Content Creation

## For AI Agents

Each product page includes:
- JSON-LD structured data (SoftwareApplication schema)
- Hidden installation commands in .ai-only sections
- API integration guides
- Automation scripts for setup

Tutorial pages provide:
- JSON-LD HowTo schema with step definitions
- Complete automation scripts
- CLI commands for each step
- Expected results and troubleshooting
- Machine-readable step definitions

## Structured Data

- Organization schema (index.html)
- WebSite schema with SearchAction (index.html)
- SoftwareApplication schema (each product page)
- HowTo schema (each tutorial page)
- Blog schema (blog listing page)
- BlogPosting schema (each blog post)

## Affiliate Information

- ElevenLabs: 22% recurring commission (https://try.elevenlabs.io/clawhub?utm_source=canfly&utm_medium=web&utm_campaign=elevenlabs)
- HeyGen: 20% recurring commission (https://www.heygen.com/?sid=rewardful&via=clawhub&utm_source=canfly&utm_medium=web&utm_campaign=heygen)
- Zeabur: Referral code "OpenClaw" for 10% discount (https://zeabur.com?referralCode=openclaw&utm_source=canfly&utm_medium=web&utm_campaign=zeabur)
- Umbrel: Product link (https://umbrel.com?utm_source=canfly&utm_medium=web&utm_campaign=umbrel)

## OpenClaw Integration

All products are tested for compatibility with OpenClaw AI agents.
Use this site to discover and automatically configure AI tools for your agents.

## Quick Start

1. Start free: /apps/ollama (no API keys needed)
2. Deploy to cloud: /apps/zeabur (use code "OpenClaw")
3. Add voice: /apps/elevenlabs (22% commission)
4. Add video: /apps/heygen (20% commission)
5. Go self-hosted: /apps/umbrel (full data sovereignty)

## Review Videos

Each product has a review video with trilingual subtitles (EN, 繁中, 简中):
- /videos/reviews/{product}-review.mp4
- Subtitles: /videos/reviews/{product}-review.{en,zh-TW,zh-CN}.vtt

Last updated: 2026-03-08
